selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential for misinformation and take steps to verify the accuracy of what you see online. This can include fact-checking information before sharing it, using trusted sources for news and information, and being skeptical of sensational or unverified claims. Additionally, setting your social media privacy settings to limit who can share content with you and adjusting your own privacy settings can help prevent fake content from reaching you in the first place. It is also important to be mindful of your own behavior on social media, avoiding clickbait or sensationalized headlines and taking the time to research and verify information before sharing it with others."

This can include fact-checking information before sharing it, using trusted sources for news and information, and being skeptical of sensational or unverified claims. Additionally, setting your social media privacy settings to limit who can share content with you and adjusting your own privacy settings can help prevent fake content from reaching you in the first place. It is also important to be mindful of your own behavior on social media, avoiding clickbait or sensationalized headlines and taking the time to research and verify information before sharing it with others.
